Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, so he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many blueberries as Sophia, meaning Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Together, Emily, David, and Sophia collected 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries. 

One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. Each batch was sold for $5, so the total money made was 8 * 5 = $40. 

They used all the blueberries they collected to make muffins, and the money they made from the muffins was $40.
